text.title: Junior AI-Overreliance Coaching Guide Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping PR signal count to intervention level.

decision-tree.root-question: How many overreliance signals match in this PR?

conclusion.verdict: acknowledge + approve; optionally leave teaching comment
ask one probing question; allow merge after answer

branch.question: Has junior had 3+ blocked PRs in last month?

conclusion.verdict: block PR with delta-format comment + schedule pairing

text.example: signals=3 → blocked_history=0 → block with delta-format comment.
